401.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Perform ablution after anything that has been touched by fire."
401.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Berwudhulah dari apa yang disentuh api."

402.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that when the Prophet ﷺ passed away, he was covered with a striped Yemeni garment.
402.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ wafat, beliau ditutup dengan kain bergaris dari Yaman.

403.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "We remained for several nights, then the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Have you not realised that it has been revealed to me that you will be tried in your graves?' Thereafter I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ frequently seeking refuge from the punishment of the grave."
403.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kami tinggal beberapa malam, kemudian Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidakkah kamu tahu bahwa telah diwahyukan kepadaku bahwa kalian akan diuji di kubur?' Setelah itu aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ sering berlindung dari azab kubur."

404.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Prophet ﷺ fell ill and death approached him, his head was resting on her thigh, and he fell unconscious. When he regained consciousness, his gaze was fixed toward the ceiling of the house, then he said: "O Allah, the Most Exalted Companion." Aisha said: "I knew then it was the saying he used to tell us while he was well."
404.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ sakit dan mendekati ajalnya, kepala beliau berada di pahanya, dan beliau pingsan. Ketika tersadar, pandangan beliau tertuju ke langit-langit rumah, kemudian bersabda: "Ya Allah, ar-Rafiq al-A'la." Aisyah berkata: "Aku tahu itulah ucapan yang biasa beliau ceritakan kepada kami saat beliau sehat."

405.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man asked her about fasting, and she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to fast in the month of Sha'ban, and he would observe fasting on Thursdays and Mondays."
405.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepadanya tentang puasa, maka ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berpuasa di bulan Sya'ban, dan beliau selalu mengutamakan puasa pada hari Kamis dan Senin."

406.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said regarding onions: "The last food the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate was a dish that contained onions."
406.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata mengenai bawang: "Makanan terakhir yang dimakan Rasulullah ﷺ adalah makanan yang mengandung bawang."

407.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade al-wisal (continuous fasting without breaking the fast at night) in fasting."
407.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ melarang al-wisal (puasa terus-menerus tanpa berbuka di malam hari) dalam berpuasa."

408.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Verily Allah the Almighty and His angels send blessings upon those who stand in the prayer rows, and whoever fills a gap, Allah will raise him a degree because of it."
408.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Sesungguhnya Allah Yang Maha Mulia dan para malaikat-Nya bershalawat atas orang-orang yang berdiri dalam shaf shalat, dan barangsiapa menutup celah maka Allah akan mengangkatnya satu derajat karenanya."

409.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Allah will raise people on the Day of Resurrection barefoot, naked and uncircumcised." Aisha asked: "O Messenger of Allah, what about their private parts?" He replied: "'For every person among them on that Day will be a matter to keep him occupied.'"
409.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Allah akan membangkitkan manusia pada Hari Kiamat dalam keadaan telanjang kaki, telanjang badan, dan tidak dikhitan." Aisyah bertanya: "Wahai Rasulullah, bagaimana dengan aurat mereka?" Beliau menjawab: "'Setiap orang di antara mereka pada hari itu akan disibukkan dengan urusannya sendiri.'"

410.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw rain, he would say: "O Allah, make it beneficial rain."
410.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ketika melihat hujan, beliau berdoa: "Ya Allah, jadikanlah ini hujan yang bermanfaat."

411.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ, when he saw rain, would say: "O Allah, make it beneficial rain."
411.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ketika melihat hujan, beliau berdoa: "Ya Allah, jadikanlah ini hujan yang bermanfaat."

412.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to accept gifts and reward the giver for them."
412.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menerima hadiah dan memberi balasan kepada orang yang memberikannya."

413.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed the tawaf of ifadah from the last part of his day after praying Dhuhr, then returned to Mina and stayed there on the days of Tashriq. He would stone the jamarat when the sun declined, throwing seven pebbles at each one, saying Allahu Akbar with each pebble. He would stand at the first and second and remain there for a long time in humble supplication, but he would not pause at the third."
413.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan tawaf ifadah di penghujung harinya setelah shalat Dzuhur, kemudian kembali ke Mina dan tinggal di sana pada hari-hari Tasyriq. Beliau melempar jamarat ketika matahari tergelincir, melempar tujuh batu kerikil pada masing-masingnya, bertakbir setiap kali melempar. Beliau berhenti di yang pertama dan kedua dan berdiam lama dalam doa yang khusyuk, tetapi beliau tidak berhenti di yang ketiga."

414.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever receives a kindness, let him repay it. Whoever is unable to repay it, let him acknowledge it, for whoever acknowledges it has thanked it. And whoever claims to be satisfied with what he has not received is like one wearing two garments of falsehood."
414.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa menerima kebaikan, hendaklah ia membalasnya. Barangsiapa tidak mampu membalasnya, hendaklah ia menyebutnya, karena barangsiapa menyebutnya maka ia telah mensyukurinya. Barangsiapa merasa puas dengan apa yang tidak ia dapatkan, maka ia seperti orang yang mengenakan dua pakaian kepalsuan."

415.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When I oiled the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, I would part it from the top of his head and let his forelock fall down."
415.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika aku meminyaki rambut Rasulullah ﷺ, aku menyisirnya dari ubun-ubun beliau dan membiarkan rambutnya jatuh ke depan."

416.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'A believer, through his good character, reaches the rank of one who prays at night and fasts during the day.'"
416.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seorang mukmin dengan akhlak baiknya dapat mencapai derajat orang yang shalat malam dan berpuasa di siang hari.'"

417.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ told her that the Quraysh would be the first of his ummah to join him, because death would become appealing to them while their ummah would be sparing with them. He then described the condition of people after that as grasshoppers eating one another until the Hour comes upon them.
417.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memberitahunya bahwa orang-orang Quraisy akan menjadi yang pertama dari umatnya menyusul beliau, karena kematian akan menjadi mudah bagi mereka sementara umat mereka bakhil terhadap mereka. Beliau kemudian menggambarkan kondisi manusia setelah itu seperti belalang yang saling memakan satu sama lain hingga Kiamat datang.

418.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she was told the month had only twenty-nine days, she said: "What surprises you about that? I fasted twenty-nine days with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ more often than I fasted thirty."
418.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika diberitahu bahwa bulan hanya dua puluh sembilan hari, ia berkata: "Apa yang mengherankanmu tentang itu? Aku lebih sering berpuasa dua puluh sembilan hari bersama Rasulullah ﷺ daripada berpuasa tiga puluh hari."

419.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Fever is from the heat of Hellfire, so cool it with water."
419.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Demam berasal dari panasnya Jahannam, maka dinginkanlah dengan air."

420.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she informed them: "I used to bathe together with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel, saying to him: 'Leave some for me, leave some for me.'"
420.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mengabarkan: "Aku biasa mandi bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dari satu wadah, dan aku berkata kepadanya: 'Sisakan untukku, sisakan untukku.'"

421.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Jibril (peace be upon him) continued to urge me to treat neighbors well until I thought he would make them heirs.'"
421.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jibril (alaihi salam) terus menerus mewasiatkan kepadaku untuk berbuat baik kepada tetangga, hingga aku mengira bahwa ia akan menjadikan mereka pewaris.'"

422.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked about the character of the Prophet ﷺ, she replied: "His character was the Quran. Do you not read the Quran: the word of Allah the Almighty: 'And indeed you are of a great moral character'?" She also advised one who wished to remain celibate: "Have you not read: 'There has certainly been for you in the Messenger of Allah an excellent pattern'? The Messenger of Allah ﷺ married and had children."
422.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya tentang akhlak Nabi ﷺ, ia menjawab: "Akhlak beliau adalah Al-Quran. Tidakkah kamu membaca firman Allah Yang Maha Mulia: 'Dan sesungguhnya engkau benar-benar berbudi pekerti yang agung'?" Ia juga menasihati seseorang yang ingin membujang: "Tidakkah kamu membaca: 'Sungguh pada diri Rasulullah terdapat suri teladan yang baik'? Rasulullah ﷺ menikah dan memiliki keturunan."

423.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "We would surely have forbidden women from the mosques as the Children of Israel forbade their women."
423.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Sungguh kami pasti akan melarang perempuan dari masjid-masjid sebagaimana Bani Isra'il melarang perempuan mereka."

424.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "It is as if I can see myself twisting the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from sheep, while he then refrained from nothing that was not restricted."
424.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seolah-olah aku melihat diriku menganyam kalung-kalung hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ dari bulu domba, sementara beliau kemudian tidak menahan diri dari apa pun yang tidak dilarang."

425.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ used to frequently supplicate: 'O Turner of hearts, keep my heart firm upon Your religion.' I asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, you supplicate so frequently with this supplication.' He replied: 'The heart of the son of Adam is between two of Allah's fingers; when He wills, He causes it to deviate and when He wills, He keeps it upright.'"
425.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ sering berdoa: 'Wahai Dzat yang membolak-balikkan hati, tetapkanlah hatiku di atas agama-Mu.' Aku bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, engkau sangat sering berdoa dengan doa ini.' Beliau menjawab: 'Hati anak Adam berada di antara dua jari Allah; jika Dia berkehendak, Dia akan memalingkannya, dan jika Dia berkehendak, Dia akan meluruskannya.'"

426.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, Allah the Almighty says: "He will be reckoned with an easy reckoning."' He said: 'That is the presentation of deeds. Whoever is questioned closely in the reckoning on that Day will be punished.'"
426.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, Allah Yang Maha Mulia berfirman: "Dia akan dihisab dengan hisab yang mudah."' Beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah pemaparan amal. Barangsiapa diperiksa amalnya secara detail pada hari itu, maka ia akan diazab.'"

427.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lie with her while she was menstruating. She said: "Yes, when I tied my lower garment. In those days we had only one bed. When Allah the Almighty blessed me with another bed, I would stay apart from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ."
427.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ pernah berbaring bersamanya saat ia haid. Ia berkata: "Ya, ketika aku mengikat kain bawahku. Pada saat itu kami hanya memiliki satu tempat tidur. Ketika Allah Yang Maha Mulia menganugerahkan kepadaku tempat tidur yang lain, aku memisahkan diri dari Rasulullah ﷺ."

428.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The good fortune of a woman lies in the ease of her marriage proposal and the ease of her dowry.'"
428.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Keberuntungan seorang wanita terletak pada kemudahan dalam lamarannya dan kemudahan dalam maharnya.'"

429.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was in a state of ritual impurity and wished to sleep, he would perform ablution as he would for prayer before sleeping." He also said: "Whoever wishes to sleep while in a state of ritual impurity, let him perform ablution as for prayer."
429.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ dalam keadaan junub dan ingin tidur, beliau berwudhu seperti wudhu untuk shalat sebelum tidur." Beliau juga bersabda: "Barangsiapa ingin tidur dalam keadaan junub, hendaklah ia berwudhu seperti wudhu untuk shalat."

430.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she was told of people who recite the Quran once or twice in a single night, she said: "Those people recited but did not truly recite. I used to stand in prayer with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ throughout the whole night, and he would recite Surah Al-Baqarah, Surah Al-Imran and Surah An-Nisa. He would not pass a verse containing a warning except that he would call upon Allah and seek refuge with Him, and he would not pass a verse containing glad tidings except that he would call upon Allah and beseech Him."
430.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika diberitahu ada orang yang membaca Al-Quran sekali atau dua kali dalam satu malam, ia berkata: "Orang-orang itu membaca tetapi tidak benar-benar membaca. Aku biasa berdiri shalat bersama Rasulullah ﷺ sepanjang malam, dan beliau membaca Surah Al-Baqarah, Surah Ali Imran, dan Surah An-Nisa. Beliau tidak melewati ayat yang mengandung peringatan kecuali beliau berdoa kepada Allah dan berlindung kepada-Nya, dan tidak melewati ayat yang mengandung kabar gembira kecuali beliau berdoa kepada Allah dan memohon kepada-Nya."

431.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman asked the Prophet ﷺ whether a woman should perform ghusl when she experiences a wet dream and sees fluid. He said: "Yes." Aisha then said: "May your hands be soiled!" But the Prophet ﷺ said: "Leave her," then explained: "The resemblance of a child comes from whichever fluid predominates — when the woman's fluid prevails over the man's, the child resembles the maternal uncles, and when the man's fluid prevails over the woman's, the child resembles the paternal uncles."
431.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ apakah seorang wanita harus mandi ketika ia bermimpi basah dan melihat cairan. Beliau bersabda: "Ya." Aisyah lalu berkata: "Semoga tanganmu kotor!" Tetapi Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Biarkan dia," lalu menjelaskan: "Kemiripan anak berasal dari cairan yang lebih dominan — ketika cairan wanita lebih banyak dari cairan laki-laki, anak menyerupai paman dari pihak ibu, dan ketika cairan laki-laki lebih banyak dari cairan wanita, anak menyerupai paman dari pihak ayah."

432.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she observed a woman who was about to eat a date but split it between her two daughters when they begged her for food. She mentioned this to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he said: "Indeed, Allah the Almighty has made Paradise obligatory for her because of it, and has freed her from the Fire because of it."
432.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia melihat seorang wanita yang hampir memakan sebuah kurma tetapi membelahnya untuk kedua putrinya ketika mereka meminta makan. Ia menceritakan hal ini kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau bersabda: "Sesungguhnya Allah Yang Maha Mulia telah mewajibkan surga baginya karena itu, dan telah membebaskannya dari neraka karena itu."

433.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "He went toward Baqi' al-Gharqad and stood at its near side, then raised his hands and departed. When he returned, Barirah informed me. In the morning I asked him: 'O Messenger of Allah, where did you go last night?' He said: 'I was sent to the people of Baqi' to pray for them.'"
433.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Beliau pergi menuju Baqi' al-Gharqad dan berdiri di sisi terdekatnya, kemudian mengangkat tangannya dan pergi. Ketika kembali, Barirah memberitahuku. Pada pagi harinya aku bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, ke mana engkau pergi semalam?' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku diutus kepada penduduk Baqi' untuk mendoakan mereka.'"

434.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to perform i'tikaf in the last ten days of Ramadan until Allah took him. After him, his wives continued to observe i'tikaf.
434.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ selalu beri'tikaf pada sepuluh hari terakhir bulan Ramadan hingga Allah mewafatkannya. Setelah beliau wafat, istri-istri beliau melanjutkan i'tikaf.

435.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never delayed any prayer past its later time twice until Allah the Almighty took him."
435.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah menunda shalat hingga waktunya yang terakhir dua kali sampai Allah Yang Maha Mulia mewafatkannya."

436.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ instructed the people in the year of the Farewell Pilgrimage: "Whoever among you wishes to begin with 'Umrah before Hajj, let him do so." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ himself performed Hajj alone and did not perform 'Umrah.
436.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan manusia pada tahun Haji Wada': "Barangsiapa di antara kalian yang ingin memulai dengan umrah sebelum haji, maka lakukanlah." Rasulullah ﷺ sendiri melakukan haji ifrad dan tidak berumrah.

437.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she wished to enter the Ka'bah and pray inside it. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ took her hand and led her into the Hijr, saying: "Pray in the Hijr if you wish to enter the House, for it is part of the House. However, your people made it short when they built the Ka'bah and excluded it from the House."
437.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ingin masuk ke Ka'bah dan shalat di dalamnya. Rasulullah ﷺ mengambil tangannya dan membimbingnya ke dalam Hijr, bersabda: "Shalatlah di Hijr jika kamu ingin masuk ke Baitullah, karena Hijr adalah bagian dari Baitullah. Akan tetapi kaummu membuatnya lebih pendek ketika mereka membangun Ka'bah dan mengeluarkannya dari Baitullah."

438.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to say when visiting the sick: "In the name of Allah, with the dust of our land and the saliva of some of us, may our sick be healed, by the permission of our Lord."
438.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa berdoa ketika mengunjungi orang sakit: "Bismillah, dengan tanah bumi kami dan air liur sebagian kami, semoga orang sakit kami disembuhkan, dengan izin Rabb kami."

439.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed away at the age of sixty-three years."
439.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ wafat pada usia enam puluh tiga tahun."

440.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I brought Ibn al-Zubayr to the Prophet ﷺ, and he rubbed his palate with a date and said: 'This is 'Abdullah, and you are the mother of 'Abdullah.'"
440.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku membawa Ibnu al-Zubayr kepada Nabi ﷺ, dan beliau menggosok langit-langit mulutnya dengan kurma dan bersabda: 'Ini adalah Abdullah, dan kamu adalah ibu Abdullah.'"

441.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she was given permission by the Prophet ﷺ to retaliate against someone who had argued with her in anger, she turned to face that person. But when she saw her, she turned away until the Prophet ﷺ said: "Go on and retaliate." She then faced her until she saw her tongue dry in her mouth without being able to respond. Aisha said: "Then I saw the face of the Prophet ﷺ gleaming with delight."
441.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ mengizinkannya membalas seseorang yang telah berdebat dengannya saat marah, ia berbalik menghadap orang itu. Namun ketika melihatnya, ia berpaling hingga Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Ayo, balaslah." Ia pun menghadapinya hingga ia melihat lidahnya kering di mulutnya tanpa bisa merespons. Aisyah berkata: "Kemudian aku melihat wajah Nabi ﷺ bercahaya dengan kegembiraan."

442.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, Ibn Jud'an in the time of Jahiliyyah used to maintain ties of kinship and feed the poor. Will that benefit him?' He said: 'No, O Aisha. He never said a single day: My Lord, forgive me my sin on the Day of Judgment.'"
442.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, Ibnu Jud'an di masa Jahiliyyah biasa menyambung silaturahmi dan memberi makan orang-orang miskin. Apakah itu bermanfaat baginya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak, wahai Aisyah. Ia tidak pernah mengucapkan satu hari pun: Ya Rabbku, ampunilah dosaku pada Hari Pembalasan.'"

443.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that someone came to her asking about something, and she said: "I will inform you of what I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say in this house of mine: 'O Allah, whoever is given authority over any matter of my ummah and causes them hardship, make it hard for him. And whoever is given authority over any matter of my ummah and is gentle with them, be gentle with him.'"
443.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa seseorang datang kepadanya menanyakan sesuatu, dan ia berkata: "Aku akan memberitahumu apa yang aku dengar Rasulullah ﷺ ucapkan di rumahku ini: 'Ya Allah, barangsiapa yang diberi wewenang atas suatu urusan umatku dan menyulitkan mereka, maka persulitlah ia. Dan barangsiapa yang diberi wewenang atas suatu urusan umatku dan bersikap lembut kepada mereka, maka bersikaplan lembut kepadanya.'"

444.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when some women from Basra visited her, she instructed them to use water for istinja and told them: "Tell your husbands to do the same, for the Prophet ﷺ used to do it, and it is a remedy for hemorrhoids."
444.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika beberapa wanita dari Bashrah mengunjunginya, ia memerintahkan mereka menggunakan air untuk istinja dan berkata: "Perintahkan suami-suami kalian untuk melakukan hal yang sama, karena Nabi ﷺ biasa melakukannya, dan itu adalah obat untuk wasir."

445.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade al-wisal (continuous fasting without breaking the fast at night) in fasting."
445.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ melarang al-wisal (puasa terus-menerus tanpa berbuka di malam hari) dalam berpuasa."

446.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked in how many garments the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was shrouded, and she said: "In three white garments from Suhul."
446.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya dengan berapa helai kain kafan Rasulullah ﷺ dikafani, dan ia berkata: "Dengan tiga helai kain kafan putih dari Suhul."

447.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The dowry of his wives was twelve uqiyyah and a nash." She was asked: "Do you know what a nash is?" She said: "No." She was told: "Half an uqiyyah." She said: "So that is five hundred dirhams. This was the dowry of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for his wives."
447.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Mahar istri-istri beliau adalah dua belas uqiyyah dan satu nash." Ditanya: "Tahukah kamu apa itu nash?" Ia berkata: "Tidak." Diberitahu: "Setengah uqiyyah." Ia berkata: "Berarti itu lima ratus dirham. Inilah mahar Rasulullah ﷺ untuk istri-istrinya."

448.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved to begin with the right in all of his affairs as much as he was able — in his purification, his combing of hair, and putting on his sandals.
448.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ suka memulai dari kanan dalam semua urusannya semampu mungkin — dalam bersuci, menyisir rambut, dan memakai sandal.

449.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the night prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and she said: "He prayed continuously." She was asked: "At what time did he rise?" She said: "When he heard the cock's crow."
449.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang shalat malam Rasulullah ﷺ dan ia berkata: "Beliau shalat secara terus-menerus." Ditanya: "Pada waktu berapa beliau bangun?" Ia berkata: "Ketika beliau mendengar kokok ayam."

450.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray while she was between him and the qiblah.
450.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat sementara ia berada di antara beliau dan arah kiblat.
